questions.prompt: We often have it in America, but it may ____ different here. (提示: 有味道；尝)
questions.context_sentence: We often have it in America, but it may taste different here.
questions.hint: 谐音“太斯特”，联想：这道菜的味道真是太斯特（特别）了！
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我们在美国经常吃这个，但这里可能味道不一样。

questions.context_sentence: There isn't any tea, but there's watermelon juice!
questions.hint: 联想记忆：water(水) + melon(瓜)，里面全都是水的瓜，当然就是西瓜啦！
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 没有茶，但是有西瓜汁！

questions.context_sentence: I'd like noodles with beef and cabbage.
questions.hint: 谐音“卡北极”，联想：探险队被卡在北极，每天只能靠吃冰冻的卷心菜补充维生素。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我想要牛肉白菜面条。

questions.prompt: Well, there's beef and carrot, and ____ and onion.
questions.context_sentence: Well, there's beef and carrot, and mutton and onion.
questions.hint: 谐音“马腾”，联想：草原上的小马腾飞起来，因为被吃羊肉的狼追赶。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 嗯，有牛肉胡萝卜馅的，还有羊肉洋葱馅的。

questions.context_sentence: After that we sometimes have ice cream or cookies for a treat!
questions.hint: 联想记忆：cook(厨师) + ie(小东西)，厨师做出来的甜甜小点心就是曲奇。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 在那之后，我们有时会吃冰淇淋或饼干作为奖励！

questions.context_sentence: Well, there's beef and carrot, and mutton and onion.
questions.hint: 谐音“按你按”，联想：切洋葱辣眼睛，让人忍不住一直按你按你（揉眼睛）。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 嗯，有牛肉胡萝卜馅的，还有羊肉洋葱馅的。

questions.context_sentence: Oh, dumplings, my favourite!
questions.hint: 谐音“当铺林”，联想：古代的当铺林立的街头，都在卖热气腾腾的饺子。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 哦，饺子，我的最爱！

questions.context_sentence: How do we make healthy eating choices?
questions.hint: 谐音“抽一丝”，联想：从一堆五颜六色的丝线中，小心翼翼地选择抽出一丝。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我们如何做出健康的饮食选择？

options: n. 一餐所吃的食物；一餐
questions.meaning: n. 一餐所吃的食物；一餐
questions.context_sentence: Eating balanced meals is very important when we are young.
questions.hint: 谐音“米偶”，联想：用大米捏了一个可爱的小木偶，放在餐桌上陪我吃这一餐。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 当我们年轻的时候，吃均衡的膳食非常重要。

questions.context_sentence: Dongpo pork is famous in China.
questions.hint: 谐音“破壳”，联想：小猪仔破壳而出，长大后变成了猪肉（脑洞大开更好记）。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 东坡肉在中国很有名。

questions.context_sentence: Instead, I have a pear, a banana, or some strawberries!
questions.hint: 组合联想：straw(稻草/麦管) + berry(浆果)，长在草丛里的红色小浆果就是草莓。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我吃一个梨、一根香蕉或者一些草莓来代替！

questions.context_sentence: Customer
questions.hint: 词根词缀：custom(风俗/习惯) + er(人)，习惯经常来店里买东西的人就是顾客。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 顾客

questions.prompt: Waitress: Sir, we ____ everyone. (提示: 提供；服务)
questions.context_sentence: Waitress: Sir, we serve everyone.
questions.hint: 谐音“蛇舞”，联想：印度街头的艺人提供表演服务，吹起笛子让蛇跳舞。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 服务员：先生，我们为所有人服务。

questions.context_sentence: Instead, I have a pear, a banana, or some strawberries!
questions.hint: 谐音“硬死呆的”，联想：他没有出去玩，代替的是硬死呆在家里背单词。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我吃一个梨、一根香蕉或者一些草莓来代替！

questions.context_sentence: Instead, I have a pear, a banana, or some strawberries!
questions.hint: 谐音“赔鹅”，联想：他不小心砸坏了邻居的梨树，只好赔给主人一只鹅。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我吃一个梨、一根香蕉或者一些草莓来代替！

questions.prompt: Ice cream, sweets, and chocolate are delicious, but they usually have lots of ____.
questions.context_sentence: Ice cream, sweets, and chocolate are delicious, but they usually have lots of sugar.
questions.hint: 谐音“休哥”，联想：喝咖啡苦得受不了，对服务员喊：休哥（老哥），加点糖！
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 冰淇淋、糖果和巧克力很美味，但是它们通常含有大量的糖。

questions.context_sentence: Improve Your Eating Habits.
questions.hint: 谐音“音谱入屋”，联想：把美妙的音乐曲谱带入屋子，极大地改善了房间的氛围。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 改善你的饮食习惯。

questions.context_sentence: Healthy eating means eating healthy food and having good eating habits.
questions.hint: 谐音“海龟”，联想：海龟有一种非常好的习惯，就是慢慢悠悠不着急，所以能长寿。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 健康饮食意味着吃健康的食物和拥有良好的饮食习惯。

questions.prompt: But it often has lots of ____, fat, and sugar.
questions.context_sentence: But it often has lots of salt, fat, and sugar.
questions.hint: 谐音“馊的”，联想：夏天做菜如果不放盐，很快就会变成馊的了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 但是它通常含有大量的盐、脂肪和糖。

questions.prompt: n. 脂肪 adj. 肥胖的
questions.meaning: n. 脂肪 adj. 肥胖的
questions.context_sentence: Eating fat is important for keeping us healthy.
questions.hint: 谐音“发它”，联想：吃了太多脂肪，身体就像面团一样发它（发酵膨胀）变胖了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 摄入脂肪对保持我们的健康很重要。

questions.context_sentence: That makes us put on weight.
questions.hint: 谐音“胃特”，联想：他的胃特别能装东西，所以吃出了惊人的体重。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 那会让我们体重增加。

questions.prompt: Eating fast food like pizza and hamburgers too often may ____ heart problems later. (提示: 造成；导致)
questions.context_sentence: Eating fast food like pizza and hamburgers too often may cause heart problems later.
questions.hint: 谐音“扣子”，联想：吃得太多导致身体发胖，最终崩开了衬衫的扣子。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 经常吃披萨和汉堡等快餐可能会在以后引起心脏问题。

questions.context_sentence: Eating fast food like pizza and hamburgers too often may cause heart problems later.
questions.hint: 谐音“哈特”，联想：跑完一千米长跑后，我的哈特（心脏）在扑通扑通狂跳！
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 经常吃披萨和汉堡等快餐可能会在以后引起心脏问题。

questions.context_sentence: Eating balanced meals is very important when we are young.
questions.hint: 谐音“白愣死”，联想：如果你不吃均衡的饮食，导致营养不良，大夫看了也会白愣死（翻白眼）。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 当我们年轻的时候，吃均衡的膳食非常重要。

questions.prompt: It is easy to feel ____ and find it hard to focus on our work or studies if we don't eat breakfast.
questions.context_sentence: It is easy to feel sleepy and find it hard to focus on our work or studies if we don't eat breakfast.
questions.hint: 词缀拆解：sleep(睡觉) + y(充满...的)，脑子里全都是睡觉的念头，就是困倦的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 如果我们不吃早餐，很容易感到困倦，并且很难集中精力工作或学习。

questions.prompt: adj. 不好的；贫穷的；可怜的
questions.meaning: adj. 不好的；贫穷的；可怜的
questions.context_sentence: How many poor eating habits are mentioned?
questions.hint: 谐音“破”，联想：衣服穿得破破烂烂的，真是个贫穷又可怜的人；在这里引申为习惯“不好”。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 提到了多少个不良饮食习惯？

questions.context_sentence: Reason for the result.
questions.hint: 谐音“里灶头”，联想：不小心烧了里屋的灶头，引发火灾的结果可是很严重的！
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 结果的原因。

questions.prompt: Read the ____ from a clinic's newsletter.
questions.context_sentence: Read the article from a clinic's newsletter.
questions.hint: 谐音“阿提狗”，联想：这篇优秀的英语文章，其实写的是邻居阿提和他的狗的故事。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 阅读一篇来自诊所通讯的文章。

questions.context_sentence: Do you think the poor eating habits in the article are common among young people?
questions.hint: 谐音“靠门”，联想：下课时大家都习惯性地靠门站着聊天，这在学生中是一个普遍的现象。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你认为文章中提到的不良饮食习惯在年轻人中普遍吗？

options: adj. 足够的 adv. 足够地
n. 一餐所吃的食物；一餐
questions.context_sentence: Do you think the poor eating habits in the article are common among young people?
questions.hint: 谐音“阿蒙”，联想：三国里吴下阿蒙经过学习，在众人之中脱颖而出，令人刮目相看。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你认为文章中提到的不良饮食习惯在年轻人中普遍吗？

questions.prompt: First, I drink too many ____ drinks.
questions.context_sentence: First, I drink too many soft drinks.
questions.hint: 谐音“沙发头”，联想：靠在沙发头上睡觉，感觉非常柔软舒服。（soft drink引申为不含酒精的软饮料）
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 首先，我喝了太多的软饮料。

questions.prompt: adj. 足够的 adv. 足够地
questions.meaning: adj. 足够的 adv. 足够地
questions.context_sentence: Second, I don't drink enough water.
questions.hint: 谐音“一拿福”，联想：过年时长辈一拿出大“福”字，就说明家里有足够的福气了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 其次，我喝的水不够。

options: adj. 不好的；贫穷的；可怜的
questions.context_sentence: I drink water when I am thirsty, but it's better to drink before I get thirsty.
questions.hint: 谐音“色丝提”，联想：沙漠里的人因为太口渴，发出的声音干涩得像是一把拉色了的丝提琴。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我口渴的时候会喝水，但最好在口渴之前就喝。

questions.context_sentence: Not all fat makes us gain weight.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：gain是获得，weight是重量。获得了多余的重量，那就是变胖增加体重。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 不是所有的脂肪都会让我们发胖。

questions.context_sentence: It is easy to feel sleepy and find it hard to focus on our work or studies if we don't eat breakfast.
questions.hint: 谐音联想：focus谐音“佛壳死”，为了修佛，老和尚盯着木鱼敲，把佛壳都敲破了，真是集中注意力于此啊！
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 如果我们不吃早餐，很容易感到困倦，并且很难集中精力工作或学习。

options: n. 脂肪 adj. 肥胖的
questions.context_sentence: We often have it in America, but it may taste different here.
questions.hint: 谐音“太斯特”，联想：这道菜的味道真是太斯特（特别）了！
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我们在美国经常吃这个，但这里可能味道不一样。

questions.context_sentence: Waitress: Sir, we serve everyone.
questions.hint: 谐音“蛇舞”，联想：印度街头的艺人提供表演服务，吹起笛子让蛇跳舞。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 服务员：先生，我们为所有人服务。

questions.hint: 谐音“音谱入屋”，联想：把美妙的音乐曲谱带入屋子，极大地改善了房间的氛围。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 改善你的饮食习惯。

questions.context_sentence: Eating fast food like pizza and hamburgers too often may cause heart problems later.
questions.hint: 谐音“扣子”，联想：吃得太多导致身体发胖，最终崩开了衬衫的扣子。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 经常吃披萨和汉堡等快餐可能会在以后引起心脏问题。

questions.prompt: It is easy to feel sleepy and find it hard to ____ our work or studies if we don't eat breakfast.
questions.context_sentence: It is easy to feel sleepy and find it hard to focus on our work or studies if we don't eat breakfast.
questions.hint: 谐音联想：focus谐音“佛壳死”，为了修佛，老和尚盯着木鱼敲，把佛壳都敲破了，真是集中注意力于此啊！

questions.cn: 如果我们不吃早餐，很容易感到困倦，并且很难集中精力工作或学习。

questions.context_sentence: Not all fat makes us gain weight.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：gain是获得，weight是重量。获得了多余的重量，那就是变胖增加体重。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 不是所有的脂肪都会让我们发胖。

questions.context_sentence: How do we make healthy eating choices?
questions.hint: 谐音“抽一丝”，联想：从一堆五颜六色的丝线中，小心翼翼地选择抽出一丝。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我们如何做出健康的饮食选择？

questions.prompt: Healthy eating means eating healthy food and having good eating ____.
questions.context_sentence: Healthy eating means eating healthy food and having good eating habits.
questions.hint: 谐音“海龟”，联想：海龟有一种非常好的习惯，就是慢慢悠悠不着急，所以能长寿。

questions.cn: 健康饮食意味着吃健康的食物和拥有良好的饮食习惯。

questions.hint: 词根词缀：custom(风俗/习惯) + er(人)，习惯经常来店里买东西的人就是顾客。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 顾客

questions.context_sentence: Eating balanced meals is very important when we are young.
questions.hint: 谐音“白愣死”，联想：如果你不吃均衡的饮食，导致营养不良，大夫看了也会白愣死（翻白眼）。

questions.cn: 当我们年轻的时候，吃均衡的膳食非常重要。

questions.context_sentence: It is easy to feel sleepy and find it hard to focus on our work or studies if we don't eat breakfast.
questions.hint: 词缀拆解：sleep(睡觉) + y(充满...的)，脑子里全都是睡觉的念头，就是困倦的。

questions.context_sentence: Reason for the result.
questions.hint: 谐音“里灶头”，联想：不小心烧了里屋的灶头，引发火灾的结果可是很严重的！
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 结果的原因。

options: adj. 足够的 adv. 足够地
questions.context_sentence: Do you think the poor eating habits in the article are common among young people?
questions.hint: 谐音“靠门”，联想：下课时大家都习惯性地靠门站着聊天，这在学生中是一个普遍的现象。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你认为文章中提到的不良饮食习惯在年轻人中普遍吗？

questions.prompt: Second, I don't drink ____ water. (提示: 足够的 adv. 足够地)
questions.meaning: adj. 足够的 adv. 足够地
questions.context_sentence: Second, I don't drink enough water.
questions.hint: 谐音“一拿福”，联想：过年时长辈一拿出大“福”字，就说明家里有足够的福气了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 其次，我喝的水不够。

questions.context_sentence: Read the article from a clinic's newsletter.
questions.hint: 谐音“阿提狗”，联想：这篇优秀的英语文章，其实写的是邻居阿提和他的狗的故事。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 阅读一篇来自诊所通讯的文章。
